name: Baked Beans

pros.title: cheap and convenient
pros.explanation: Very easy to use as a quick meal component.

pros.title: still keeps some fibre
pros.explanation: Not completely nutritionally empty despite the weaker category fit.

pros.title: has practical comfort-food appeal
pros.explanation: People actually eat it, which matters in the real world.

cons.title: added sugar is a major category problem
cons.explanation: Legumes are supposed to win on slow-carb behaviour, and this pushes the opposite way.

cons.title: processing drags the category fit down
cons.explanation: The canned sweet-sauce format makes it a worse version of what legumes are supposed to be.

cons.title: weak protein usefulness for a legume
cons.explanation: It does not deliver the strong fibre-plus-protein combo that defines elite legumes.

sourceNotes: Values are approximate placeholders for tuning only.
